disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden new bilateral lower-limb weakness and numbness with inability to bear weight, on a background of several weeks of severe low back and pelvic pain
trigger_question_examples: When did the leg weakness start?
Can you stand or walk at all right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on tonight — both my legs went weak and numb all of a sudden and I can't take my own weight. I'm stuck on the floor.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, unremitting lumbar and pelvic pain over three weeks, unrelieved by simple oral analgesia
trigger_question_examples: How long has the back pain been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The back pain has been building for about three weeks and it's constant. I took paracetamol and it did nothing at all.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your urine?
Any blood when you pass water?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've seen blood in my wee recently.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Constitutional decline — unintentional weight loss (~7 kg), anorexia, profound fatigue over two months
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight recently?
How has your appetite and energy been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've gone right off my food, lost about seven kilos without trying, and I've been completely drained for a couple of months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic lower urinary tract symptoms — weak stream, hesitancy, nocturia — over several months (known background)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any trouble passing urine — a weak stream, or getting up at night?
How long have the waterworks problems been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For months my stream's been weak and slow to start, and I'm up several times a night to go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Non-ambulatory and alone, unable to safely mobilise, sustained a fall from leg weakness
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to move safely right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — I slipped when my legs gave way and now I'm on the floor and can't get up. I'm on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bowel/bladder continence and saddle sensation status (targeted cord-compression / cauda-equina screen)
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost control of your bladder or bowels, or noticed numbness around the saddle area?
Any new difficulty knowing when you need to pass urine or open your bowels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — I do feel a bit numb around the seat, and I'm not sure I'd know if I needed to go.
